top_signals.title: Oil market could enter ‘red zone’ by July as stocks dwindle ahead of summer travel season, IEA chief says
top_signals.summary: IEA Executive Director Fatih Birol said the single most important solution to the Iran war energy shock is the unconditional reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Retail investors turn to ‘options income’ ETFs in search for yield
top_signals.summary: Popularity of UK and European funds that use derivatives contracts to generate income soars in two years
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: US to invest $2bn in nine quantum computing companies
top_signals.summary: Beneficiaries include start-up backed by firm with links to the Trump family
